texto: As you can see, the hyphen is a nasty, tricky, evil little mark that gets its kicks igniting arguments in newsrooms and trying to make everyone in the English-speaking world look like an idiot - it's the Bill Maher of punctuation.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a June Casagrande: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “As you can see, the hyphen is a nasty, tricky, evil little mark that gets its kicks igniting argu…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, humour, language pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de language.
